key_insights.insight: Filtering water before drinking it can reduce the toxic load on the body.
key_insights.quote: Or you can filter your water before you drink it, right? And take one toxic load off your body.

key_insights.insight: Mineralized water in the morning helps address mineral deficiencies.
key_insights.quote: The reason for that is that most of us are deficient in some or several of the trace minerals in our body.

key_insights.insight: Touching the earth's surface allows for the discharge of built-up charge in the body, positively impacting red blood cell separation and function.
key_insights.quote: When you touch the surface of the earth for a few minutes, you will repolarize those.

key_insights.insight: Grounding requires direct contact with bare soil, grass, or sand, not just being on the ground floor of a building.
key_insights.quote: Yes, you've got to touch bare dirt, soil, grass, sand.

key_insights.insight: Electromagnetic field (PEMF) mats can help the body get rid of electrosmog.
key_insights.quote: It will push the electrosmog right out of your body because PMF gets rid of electrosmog, 5G, Wi-Fi.

key_insights.insight: While alkaline water does not change the pH of blood, running a low gauss current through the body can.
key_insights.quote: Alkaline water will not actually change the pH of your blood. If you want to change the pH of your blood, amongst other things, you apply a low-gauss current.

key_insights.insight: Breath work helps engage auxiliary muscles of respiration.
key_insights.quote: You can learn to do breath work, engage the auxiliary muscles of respiration, get oxygen down into the lobes of your lungs and out of the apex of your lungs.

key_insights.insight: Consistency in small daily routines, like breath work, reinforces self-trust and sets the tone for the day.
key_insights.quote: I make little promises to myself and I try to keep them. And I find that I lose confidence in myself when I consistently break really small promises to myself.

actionable_advice.how_to: Add Celtic sea salt or Baja gold salt to 10 ounces of water upon waking.

actionable_advice.advice: Incorporate grounding into your daily routine.
actionable_advice.how_to: Spend a few minutes each day with bare feet touching bare soil, grass, or sand.
Perform three rounds of 30 breaths with an extended breath hold, such as Wim Hof style breathing, every morning.

memorable_stories: The speaker's girlfriend's insights often prove scientifically accurate later on.
The speaker demonstrates the effects of a PEMF mat on blood cells with his production manager.
contrarian_claims: Cancer rates are exploding due to diet (seed oils) and not sun exposure.
Alkaline water does not change the pH of blood.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Moment 181: 5 Things Your Body Is Probably Missing, That's Making You Sick! Gary Brecka
